trivia_bullets.text: Aetherdrift (DFT) released February 14, 2025. Pacesetter Paragon is a Human Pilot creature in the set's racing framework, representing one of the ten competing teams in the Ghirapur Grand Prix — the interplanar death-race at the set's center [Scryfall: card 7364b4dc; magic.wizards.com: The Legends of Aetherdrift].

Pacesetter Paragon (2/3 for 2R) carries the Exhaust mechanic introduced in Aetherdrift: pay {2}{R} once to place a +1/+1 counter on it and grant double strike until end of turn. Exhaust abilities can only be activated once per card per game — flavored as a nitrous-style one-shot burst. The card was previewed January 24, 2025, via CNet. EDHREC rank 25,561 reflects niche use. No flavor text [Scryfall: card 7364b4dc].

Art by Wonchun Choi. The type line 'Creature — Human Pilot' uses Pilot as a creature subtype introduced for Aetherdrift's vehicle-and-mount racing theme; Pilot had precedent from Kaladesh block (2016) where it was used for vehicle-crew synergy. The Exhaust mechanic's one-use-per-game restriction makes double strike on a 2/3 body a strong but non-repeatable combat swing [Scryfall: card 7364b4dc; magic.wizards.com: Aetherdrift Mechanics].
